candidate_problem_record.subject: Chemistry
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: The Lewis structure for the molecule CO is shown below. What is one of the limitations of using this Lewis structure to represent the molecule?
candidate_problem_record.raw_answer_text: The Lewis structure shows the electrons as distributed evenly between the carbon and oxygen but they are not.
